LanguageData.WR_OptNumericTipOff: Priority grids (including mods like Numbers) draw checkmarks
LanguageData.WR_OptNumericTipWhy: It lives here because WorkRoles replaces the vanilla Work tab that hosted it.
LanguageData.WR_OptVanillaRange: Report vanilla 0-4 priorities to other mods
LanguageData.WR_OptVanillaRangeTipWhat: WorkRoles orders work by unique priorities (sequential numbers starting with 1).
LanguageData.WR_OptVanillaRangeTipOff: Other mods see those priorities as-is
LanguageData.WR_OptVanillaRangeTipOn: Priorities are mapped onto vanilla's 0-4 range
LanguageData.WR_RecOrderHelp: Here you can define the order in which roles are suggested. Training paths (defined below) can override, except for research roles (which always use the default order).
LanguageData.WR_OptRecOrderTipWhat: The order recommendations list roles in, derived from the vanilla priority grid (auto-assigned roles included).
LanguageData.WR_ActRecX: Unpin the role so it places dynamically again
LanguageData.WR_OptRecOrderTipAuto: Unlisted roles slot in automatically: training roles after their target, sub-roles after the role covering them, Hunter after the warden/childcare roles.
LanguageData.WR_OptLockedTip: Hunter is now using a fixed recommendation slot. Remove this chip to revert to dynamic positioning based on shooting skill.
LanguageData.WR_TrainingHelp: Here you can define how colonists acquire new skills and progress through roles. A training path can have multiple bands, so that roles can overlap. Colonists will be recommended all roles at their current skill level if the training path is recommended for them.
LanguageData.WR_TrainingTipWhat: Named role progressions: each role carries a skill band where it is recommended.
LanguageData.WR_TrainingTipBands: Overlapping bands coexist; where bands do not overlap the later role replaces the earlier.
LanguageData.WR_TrainingTipOrder: Assignments prioritize higher band minimums. Equal bands prioritize the pawn's weakest role skill, then the stored path order.
LanguageData.WR_PathsPanelCaption: Training Paths (click to edit an existing path)
LanguageData.WR_WhenPanelCaption: Role progression: Here you can define at what skill the displayed roles are recommended. Overlapping roles complement.
LanguageData.WR_NoXpRoleTip: No known XP-giving jobs. Mods can change what grants XP, so you may add it anyway.
LanguageData.WR_AnchorTipWhat: Where unlocked roles land in a colonist's assignment list: in path order, before or after the anchor role.
LanguageData.WR_AnchorTipWhy: Unlock timing comes from the skill bands; this controls placement.
LanguageData.WR_PathColorTip: Click to pick this path's color. By default it follows the role with the highest skill band.
LanguageData.WR_ShowPriorityGridTip: Show the priority grid for all listed colonists, respecting the active role and location filters (raw ranks or vanilla 0-4, switchable in the dialog).
LanguageData.WR_ResizeGripTip: Drag to resize the window (it can only grow from its content-fitted size). Double-click to return to automatic sizing.
LanguageData.WR_BlockerRoleTipWhat: A blocker role's jobs are never done: they are blocked ("will not do") even when a later role includes them.
LanguageData.WR_BlockerRoleTipWhy: Roles placed above the blocker still win, so you can allow exceptions by placing a role higher.
LanguageData.WR_ReasonFireFear: Genetically terrified of fire: blocks firefighting.
LanguageData.WR_RoleCapAllJobs: any of the jobs in this role
LanguageData.WR_RoleCapSomeJobs: {0} of the {1} jobs in this role
LanguageData.WR_MtcHatedWorkSignalDescription: More Than Capable permits this work, but it causes severe and escalating penalties.
LanguageData.WR_RoleAwfulSignal: {0} has an Awful signal for this role: {1}.
LanguageData.WR_ActChipDrag: Reorder or move to another colonist
LanguageData.WR_ShipTip: The gravship, while it is not parked at a settlement (a settlement tile takes precedence).
LanguageData.WR_PasteRolesTip: Paste the copied roles onto this colonist.
LanguageData.WR_EnableHereOnly: Enable '{0}' for {1} only (turns it off for its other holders)
LanguageData.WR_FixMyColonyTip: Replace every colonist's roles with their recommended roles.
LanguageData.WR_FixNeedsSingleLocation: Recommendations are computed per location. Narrow the scope filter to a single settlement or ship to use Fix My Colony.
LanguageData.WR_SetPriorityBlockedBody:
{0} attempted to set work priorities ({1}).
WorkRoles blocked {2} priority writes since the previous notice or the start of this game session.
WorkRoles owns priorities for role-managed colonists, so the change was ignored - the mod's other features are unaffected.
To get a similar effect with roles: on the Roles tab, create or edit a role containing that work and place it where you want it in each colonist's role list - or use a blocker role to forbid the work entirely.
This notice is shown once per mod per savegame.
LanguageData.WR_PreviewStale: The colony changed while the preview was open; nothing was applied.
LanguageData.WR_ReasonHunter: Carries a ranged weapon; hunting also trains Shooting.
LanguageData.WR_ReasonCoverage: Colony coverage: best available for this work.
LanguageData.WR_ReasonRemoved: Not in recommendation list. Pin roles you want to keep before applying.
LanguageData.WR_SignalAlreadyReflected: Already reflected in the displayed skill level.
LanguageData.WR_PinnedTip: Pinned: Fix My Colony and Make It So never touch this assignment.
LanguageData.WR_WillBeRemoved: Not in recommendation list. Pin roles you want to keep before applying.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionAuto: Assigned automatically to every capable pawn.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageDraft: Best remaining candidate selected to meet required coverage.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageDraftRanked: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates ({2} skill {3}). Selected to meet required coverage.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageDraftRankedNoSkill: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates. Selected to meet required coverage.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionTraining: Assigned through a training waiver for {0}.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionHunter: Carries a ranged weapon and is capable of hunting.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionFire: Fire fear requires the firefighting blocker.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionNever: This role is configured to receive no recommendations.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionUnavailable: This role's work is unavailable until its research is finished.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionExcluded: This role is managed by rules and excluded from ordinary recommendations.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionIncapable: This pawn is incapable of this role's work.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionHunterRequirements: This pawn does not carry a ranged weapon.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionAwful: An Awful signal disqualifies this pawn.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionBand: This pawn's skill level is outside the role's training band.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageFilled: Required coverage was filled by higher-ranked candidates.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionMaximum: The configured maximum of {0} colonists was filled by higher-ranked candidates.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageFilledRanked: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates ({2} skill {3}). Required coverage was filled by higher-ranked candidates.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageFilledRankedNoSkil: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates. Required coverage was filled by higher-ranked candidates.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageAlreadyFullRanked: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates ({2} skill {3}). Required coverage was already filled before additional candidates were selected.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionCoverageAlreadyFullRankedN: Ranked {0} of {1} remaining eligible candidates. Required coverage was already filled before additional candidates were selected.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionWeakSignal: The signal verdict is below Strong and required coverage did not select this pawn.
LanguageData.WR_RecDecisionNotSelected: This pawn was not selected by any recommendation rule.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreDefaultsTip: Recreate missing pre-made roles and training paths, return pre-made roles to their default groups, colors, and holder settings, and reset the recommendation order. A preview lets you pick what to restore.
LanguageData.WR_ExportTip: Write all role definitions (not assignments) to:\n{0}
LanguageData.WR_ImportClipboardInvalid: The clipboard does not contain a WorkRoles export.
LanguageData.WR_PaletteOverwriteInfo: Replaces all custom colors with the file's {0} palette entries.
LanguageData.WR_OverwriteReplaces: Applies all {0} roles from the file. Matching roles (same pre-made role, else same name) keep their colonist assignments.
LanguageData.WR_OverwriteDeletes: Deletes (not in file): {0} (colonists lose these assignments).
LanguageData.WR_PathsOverwriteInfo: Replaces all existing training paths with the file's {0} paths.
LanguageData.WR_RecOrderReplaceInfo: Replaces your recommendation order with the file's ({0} roles).
LanguageData.WR_ImportSummary: Import complete: {0} added, {1} updated, {2} deleted, {3} palette changes, {4} training paths.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreOverwriteWarning: ⚠ Highlighted items will overwrite changes you made.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreDuplicateHint: (a role with this name already exists)
LanguageData.WR_RestoreExplainRole: Creates the role from the mod's template.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreExplainCoverage: Generates a role covering this work type.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreExplainGroup: Moves the role back to group '{0}'.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreExplainColor: Resets the color to the template default.
LanguageData.WR_RestoreExplainHolders: Resets the holder mode and range to the template-driven Auto default.
LanguageData.WR_NothingToRestore: Nothing to restore: all pre-made roles and training paths are present with their default groups, colors, and holder settings, the recommendation order is the default, and no jobs were moved.
LanguageData.WR_NameTaken: A role with this name already exists.
LanguageData.WR_DeleteConfirm: Delete role '{0}'? It will be removed from all colonists.
LanguageData.WR_UnusedJobsWarning: You have jobs that are not in any role.
LanguageData.WR_CoveredByTypeTip: Covered by the work type. Click to give this job its own (reorderable) entry.
LanguageData.WR_MissingDef: {0} is not present with the current mod list (inactive until its mod returns).
LanguageData.WR_DeadEntryTip: No effect: everything this entry covers is already covered by the entries above it. Move it up to prioritize it, or remove it.
LanguageData.WR_HoldersTipWhat: Controls the desired range of colonists assigned this role.
LanguageData.WR_HoldersTipAuto: A preconfigured default based on the jobs the role contains
LanguageData.WR_HoldersTipCustom: An inclusive minimum and maximum selected by you
LanguageData.WR_HoldersTipWaivers: Minimum holder slots that may be filled by roles from a matching training path
LanguageData.WR_TuningHelp: Here you can customize inputs to the recommendation engine. Click to toggle through options.
LanguageData.WR_TuningAutoHelp: Uses WorkRoles defaults (scales with colony size)
LanguageData.WR_TuningNeverHelp: Exclude this role from being recommended
LanguageData.WR_TuningMinHelp: How many colonists should at least get this role
LanguageData.WR_TuningMaxHelp: An optional upper limit on assignments
LanguageData.WR_TuningWaiversHelp: How many of the minimum may be substituted with a training role (e.g. Medic instead of Doctor)
LanguageData.WR_VirtualRoleTip: Shown here because this role's jobs are covered by the parent role. It belongs to the "{0}" group.
LanguageData.WR_AutoRoleTip: Auto roles turn themselves on and off based on rules: active hours and location. A role is auto whenever any rule is set.
LanguageData.WR_AutoAssignTip: Newcomers (recruits, wanderers) automatically receive this role, and recommendations always place auto-assign roles first.
LanguageData.WR_CustomSwatchEmpty: Empty slot: click to pick a custom color. Custom colors are shared across all roles.
LanguageData.WR_CustomSwatchTip: Click to use this color. Right-click to redefine the slot.
LanguageData.WR_ClearRulesConfirm: Remove all rules from '{0}'? It becomes a manual role again.
LanguageData.WR_InvalidRoleTip: This role can never apply: it has no jobs, or every location it names no longer exists.
LanguageData.WR_GroupOverlayTip: Roles with rules display under Auto-Roles. The stored group returns when the rules are cleared.
LanguageData.WR_TreeToggleTip: Toggle nesting of covered roles under their combo role.
LanguageData.WR_PaletteModeTip: Arrange the palette by relevant skill or role groups, or hide it entirely. Click to cycle.
LanguageData.WR_SuppressedLocation: Off: not at this role's locations
LanguageData.WR_BillWorkerRoleTip: Only colonists actively holding this role work this bill; a rule-based role applies its rules (e.g. active hours). Selecting a worker clears the role restriction and vice versa.
LanguageData.WR_NewWorkDetected: New work types detected. Roles created or extended: {0}
LanguageData.WR_SeedReportBody: Created {0} roles and assigned role sets to {1} colonist(s) based on their work priorities.
LanguageData.WR_SeedReportFailures: Some work could not be migrated:
